intended_use: The Ahead® 200, consisting of two models, i.e., the Ahead® M-200 and the Ahead® CV-200, is indicated for use as an adjunct to standard clinical practice to aid in the evaluation of patients who are be
intended_use_full: The Ahead® 200, consisting of two models, i.e., the Ahead® M-200 and the Ahead® CV-200, is indicated for use as an adjunct to standard clinical practice to aid in the evaluation of patients who are being considered for a head CT, but should not be used as a substitute for a CT scan. This device is to be used for this purpose in patients who sustained a closed head injury within 24 hours, clinically present as a mild traumatic brain injury with a Glasgow Coma Scale score (GCS) of 13-15, and are between the ages of 18-80 years.
target_condition: Mild traumatic brain injury (concussion) with closed head injury
ground_truth: Head CT imaging for structural brain injury
